title: Russian Federation (Chechnya): For the Motherland
strengths: Contemporaneous source that records the range of civilians reportedly still trapped inside Grozny during the encirclement and immediately after the ultimatum.
limitations: The civilian counts are ranges and official statements rather than a full demographic reconstruction; they predate the final storming phase and do not provide battle-wide death totals.
notes: Core source for the civilian exposure denominator band.

title: The Conflict in Chechnya
author_or_org: House of Commons Library / Tim Youngs
variables_supported: civilians remaining in Grozny during battle
strengths: Provides a contemporaneous outside summary of the battle that explicitly notes an estimated 20,000 civilians remained in Grozny during the fighting.
limitations: Does not provide a city-bounded direct-death total for civilians or combatants; military fatality figures in the paper are theater-wide rather than city-specific.
notes: Used as the best-point civilian exposure stock and to anchor the end of the main battle window.

title: Russia's Chechen Wars 1994-2000: Lessons from Urban Combat
variables_supported: Russian assault force in city proper
strengths: Explicitly distinguishes the city-proper Russian assault force from the much larger deployment to Chechnya as a whole and gives an in-city rebel-strength band.
limitations: Operational-force counts do not solve the combatant death numerator problem; the city-proper attack force may also have fluctuated over time.
notes: Core source for the combatant exposure denominator.

title: Civilian Killings in Staropromyslovski District of Grozny
pages_or_sections: summary p. 1 and district chronology pp. 5-9
variables_supported: direct civilian deaths in district executions
strengths: Strong eyewitness-based event documentation with a minimum civilian death count and clear victim status.
limitations: District-specific source, not a citywide Grozny mortality reconstruction; no district population denominator.
notes: Core source for the split-out execution episode.
